note: StealthyFetcher's request-capture hook was not wired in (Scrapling 0.4.7 fetch() API does not expose page.on before navigation in the convenience wrapper). Primary target returned a DataDome 403 interstitial before any XHR from the real app was issued, so no app XHRs were observable to capture.

observed_interstitial_resources.notes: DataDome pre-challenge. x-datadome: protected, x-dd-b: 2, x-datadome-cid present.
DataDome challenge script URL embedded in the interstitial body.

observed_interstitial_resources.method: GET (would-be next hop in full-enforcement path)
observed_interstitial_resources.notes: Per R8 evidence, this is where the slider/puzzle CAPTCHA is served once the interstitial's DataDome payload POSTs back telemetry. We never reached this hop because the initial 403 interstitial never yielded even with humanize=True / real_chrome=False on StealthyFetcher.
